Internal Compliance Memo — Aurora Banyan Technologies Limited (BX-India listed) — DPDPA/PIT follow-up; contact: legal@abtl.example.in
Summary: Review of consent workflows for Aadhaar/PAN/GSTIN capture in vendor onboarding and handling of UPSI under Indian PIT controls for draft financials and investor updates.
Data Cluster — Mr. Devansh Kulkarni (Sales Ops Manager, Navapeta unit), DOB 1991-07-04, uses device ABT-MBB-PN-193, VPN zone KP-East, corp id ABT-OPS-4631, email devansh.kulkarni@abtl.example.in.
Linkables recorded (lawful basis: employment): PAN DKUPK1234A, Aadhaar 3456 7890 1234, GSTIN 29ABTDK1234Z1Z7; session SESS-4f2b-77ac-013; intranet IP 10.120.4.77; consentRef cns-00921.
URL artifact retained for audit: https://compliance.abtl.example.in/consent?sid=SESS-4f2b-77ac-013&dob=1991-07-04&loc=Navapeta&device=ABT-MBB-PN-193
For PIT, access to draft Q4 revenue deck (UPSI) by Mr. Kulkarni was logged via VDR “PeepalRoom” at 2026-05-14 09:30 IST; sharing limited to need-to-know under listed-entity PIT controls.
Child data check: Ms. Riya Bhasin (17, pilot user of OrchidPay Lite in Sonalpur) provided email riya.bhasin@orchidmail.example and guardian contact +91-94400-11223; processing halted pending verifiable parental consent per DPDPA child rules.
Negative precision bait: we did not collect MAC addresses, IMEI, or precise GPS for OrchidPay Lite; general demographic tags like “age band 25–34, east zone, android user” were used for product analytics only.
Separated weak identifiers (not linked to any named person): dob 1983-12-01, role “field engineer”, location “Haripura district”, device code FE-MOB-003, account alias “ops-sandbox-22”; these are examples in training material.
Obfuscated/OCR-like captures from vendor KYC: P A N: D K U P K  1 2 3 4  A; Aadhaa r: 3456-78 90-1234; G S T I N: 27 A B T K L 1 2 3 4 Z 1 Z 2; please normalize carefully.
Public-source note: the “market expansion” slide references a press article and does not by itself constitute UPSI; however, pipeline conversion rates combined with internal bookings would be UPSI until results are disclosed.
Consent records for PAN/Aadhaar are stored in Vault “Kaveri” with retention 7 years; bank a/c numbers are not processed in this workflow, and photocopies with watermark “sample only” were rejected.
Exchange-surveillance follow-up: BX-India requested a log extract of who accessed the draft investor update; we confirm no forwarding to external domains and no WhatsApp exports from devices ABT-MBB-PN-193 or ABT-OPS-212.
Routine policy text: we use cookies on the vendor portal; project-management note: todo align with ops on sprint “Neem-24”; for queries write to compliance.office@abtl.example.in or call 040-6600-7788.
